title: Cirque du Soleil: The Mystery of Mystere
original_title: Cirque du Soleil: The Mystery of Mystère
overview: Cirque du Soleil presents The Mystery of Mystère, a captivating documentary that explores how arts and science merge together using Mystère, the critically acclaimed Las Vegas show at Treasure Island, as the outlet for this message.
